question: The line chart shows revenue trends from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes the difficulty in interpreting the period from 1990 to 2000?

options.A: The chart is too small to clearly distinguish the detailed revenue pattern between 1990 and 2000.
options.B: Revenue clearly increased steadily every year from 1990 to 2000.
options.C: Revenue clearly decreased every year from 1990 to 2000.
options.D: Revenue clearly rose sharply from 1990 to 2000 and then fell back.

explanation: Revenue spiked between 1990 and 2000 then declined. Small chart elements can obscure the spike and subsequent fall.
